creator: Joerg.Pulz@frm2.tum.de
text:
(In reply to Slawomir Wojciech Wojtczak from comment #9)

I would propose to leave it as it is - or changed to CONFIRMED or IN_PROGRESS.
I can use this PR then to keep everyone up to date, provide patches and possible commits get noted too.
So we keep full track of all the history about this.
